query:
SELECT l.id, l.title, m.title as module_title, c.title as course_title 
FROM lessons l 
JOIN modules m ON l.module_id = m.id 
JOIN courses c ON m.course_id = c.id 
WHERE c.id = 2 
ORDER BY m.order_index, l.order_index;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user U12DfRhAFBW6sMR.root --database LDLtnU3Ggjm84uQbZLmZ7C --execute SELECT l.id, l.title, m.title as module_title, c.title as course_title 
FROM lessons l 
JOIN modules m ON l.module_id = m.id 
JOIN courses c ON m.course_id = c.id 
WHERE c.id = 2 
ORDER BY m.order_index, l.order_index;
